headline: How TikTok's Value Per User Compares To Facebook And Other Social Media Platforms
summary: Breakout social media platform TikTok is in the middle of a bidding war after President Donald Trump said he is banning U.S. transactions on TikTok starting on Sept. 20 unless Chinese parent company ByteDance finds an American buyer for the company by that date. A TikTok sale is reportedly imminent at a price tag reportedly in the $30 billion range.
